Objects.Name: [Module] Bubbly Plant
Objects.Notes: A bubbly plant that releases some items when touched; used in Honeyhive Galaxy and Gold Leaf Galaxy.

Classes.Name: PomponPlant
Classes.Notes: A bubbly plant that bounces the player off when they touch it. It can spawn items when hit by the player or with a Star Bit. If one of the players touch the plant with their pointer, it will swing around.

Obj_arg0.Name: Item Type
Obj_arg0.Description: The kind of item to spawn.

Obj_arg1.Name: Number of Items
Obj_arg1.Description: The number of items to spawn. Default is 1. Limit is 32 on Coins. Limit is 70 on Star Bits.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.
